gates.name: whole_brain_coverage
gates.reason: Model covers the relevant whole-brain anatomical space.

gates.name: independent_whole_brain_validation
gates.reason: Validation is not restricted to fitted or assimilated regions.

gates.name: reproducible_compute_budget
gates.reason: Compute and artifacts are reproducible by external groups.

audits.blocked_wording: partial mouse-brain model or benchmark; not a complete whole-brain twin

gates.name: single_neuron_units
gates.reason: The model represents individual neuron-like units.

gates.name: measured_synaptic_connectivity
gates.reason: Neuron-to-neuron edges are measured or independently validated, not only inferred.

gates.name: predictive_or_reproducible
gates.reason: The model predicts or reproduces held-out neural observations.

gates.name: matched_nulls_passed
gates.reason: The effect survives relevant spatial, degree, topology, or leakage controls.

gates.name: causal_or_interventional_evidence
gates.reason: Perturbation, lesion, causal, or held-out structural evidence supports mechanism.

audits.blocked_wording: predictive or structure-associated result, not causal mechanism

gates.name: behavior_above_chance
gates.reason: Behavioral decoding or control is above chance.

gates.name: behavior_competitive_with_empirical_or_baseline
gates.reason: Behavioral performance is competitive with empirical decoding or strong baselines.

gates.name: held_out_behavior_protocol
gates.reason: Behavior is evaluated on held-out sessions, animals, or conditions.

audits.blocked_wording: task-related neural dynamics with limited behavioral decoding

interpretation: Digital-twin wording is accepted only when the corresponding evidence gates pass. Prediction, BOLD correlation, and scale do not substitute for independent structure, causal, or reproducibility evidence.
